string: Open in new tab in group
Drag up to see search results
Learn about topics on websites without leaving the page. Select one or more words on the page to search for them.
By including more of a page’s text, you might see better results when using Touch to Search. You can always visit <link>settings</link> to change this.
Include surrounding text in Google searches?
By including more of a page’s text, you might see better results
Include surrounding text in Google searches
Site not working? Third-party cookies are blocked
Failed to get cookies. The current website may not have cookies. Please refresh the page and try again.
This site is in a group that can see your activity. The group is defined by %1$s
This webpage is requesting to write to your clipboard
Copy multimedia such as pictures, videos to the album
Copy this content and open it directly with the Rainsee/Kito browser after pasting for search
The webpage is requesting to write to your clipboard. You can perform the following operations
Failed to copy to the clipboard
Sorry, download / sniff prohibited by copyright
The kernel switch failed for some reason

The independent kernel version does not support switching to the default kernel. If necessary, please switch to the non kernel version. when there is an adaptation problem on the web page, you can click kernel switching in the menu bar

Web page rendering crashed ·check whether the third-party plug-in is enabled: for example, change the web page font ·some methods used in this web page are incompatible with your system kernel. It is recommended to switch to X5 kernel or download the independent kernel version
your kernel failed to load. Do you want to repair ? 1. Click Clear kernel first. 2. Install kernel on line
Browser core brings compatibility when not use. Android 7+ recommended to use system kernel / X5 kernel (x5 kernel cant sniff video). CW kernel recommends Android 7 or below after using

your mobile phone architecture is not suitable for this independent kernel temporarily. The system kernel will be enabled to provide temporary services, but various exceptions may occur. The reason may be that your mobile phone only supports 32-bit or you perform decompile operation and destroy the kernel. Please contact the author for more reasons. You can also try downloading other versions of
Kernel switching will be enabled when you create a new tab
【tip】Kernel switching behavior has been abandoned and will not be switched automatically next time
【tip】The kernel switching behavior has been recorded. It will be switched automatically next time
Kernel switching please wait a moment
You'll see content when it becomes available
You’re offline. Check your internet connection and try again.
Failed to recall/capture the image, will try to display the original image
the Extensions file is abnormal. Please confirm that the file you uploaded is correct
Based on the Android system comes with a browser kernel can not do a perfect running expansion, invite you to download the expansion version of the rain see, more perfect expansion running experience
Self installation is not supported temporarily
Installing the plug-in may cause heating and jamming. This function is an experimental function, please install it carefully. If there are exceptions, disable it

the purpose of the plug-in is to optimize the use experience of the website through third-party means. At the same time, users can add and upload freely. ① if the plug-in fails, please enter the plug-in name ② if the plug-in infringes your rights and interests, please enter the plug-in name, reason, your website domain name and your email address we are deeply sorry for this, and we will remove/modify the plug-in within 24 hours
The oil monkey has been expanded to a special installation. At present, the oil monkey function has been embedded in the browser. You can directly access the script for installation
CRX file, user JS local import
Please enter the address of the script. Be sure to note that it is a plain text web page address. Non login websites

You are installing [%1$s] you need to pay attention to the following points 1 At present, the Extensions function is still in the experiment, and the externally installed plug-ins may not fully support 2 Plugins may obtain your personal information and all behaviors. Do not install plugins from unknown sources 3 The plug-in may cause some normal functions of the browser to be unavailable, such as web page white screen flash back, etc.
Are you sure to uninstall plug-in %1$s? The cache is also deleted locally
To keep access to your passwords, export them now and then import them to your preferred password manager. Google Password Manager stopped working because Google Play services isn’t available.
The exported file may be accessible to others, including apps. Once you export, your passwords are deleted from Chrome.
To keep access to your passwords, export them now, update Google Play Services, and then import them back to Google Password Manager. <link>See full instructions</link>.
The current page cannot switch modes
Minimize tab to return to it later
Sign in to get your passwords and more on all your devices
Detection of anti-theft chain interception, try to repair, please wait
Do you want to download "^1" anyway?
Do you want to download "^1" from ^2 anyway?
Do you want to download "^1" (^2) anyway?
Do you want to download "^1" (^2) from ^3 anyway?
Apply dark theme to sites, when possible
Data parsing failed, please try again
There was an error. Try again.
%1$s invited you to access a shared item.
Recent activity bottom sheet opened at full height
Please note that the database deletion operation cannot be recovered. This function is used for bookmark exceptions caused by browser history problems. Please don not mess up
You can use Chrome any time you tap links in messages, documents and other apps
Quickly open links in messages and more
If you are unable to load any pages. Please check the device data or wifi connection
cannot directly delete the tag,delete the bookmark under the category first
Are you sure you want to remove
The night mode of the browser depends on this plug-in. If you remove this plug-in, the web page will not turn black. Are you sure to do this?
are you sure delete the password saved to
Everyone will immediately lose access to the "%1$s" tab group, and it will be deleted from all devices
This will delete the group from all devices signed into %1$s
This will permanently delete the group from your device
Are you sure you want to delete the independent UA?
Repeat push, current push is playing
Do you want to save this login information?
the file directory is denied access by the system
Chrome updates are no longer supported for this version of Android
Desktop mode has been turned off
Desktop mode has been turned on
The wider the width, the smaller the web content, allowing for more items to fit.
For mobile and foldable devices, it is recommended to set it to 980; for tablets, a suggested setting is 1280.
The set width should be greater than 500 and less than 2000.
Input URL invokes prompt when media is downloadable
Detects that the clipboard contains extensions for installation, whether to go
It is detected that the extension is occupied by the homepage class extension, please disable/remove the extension first.
Confirm the content you need to import, detected number of passwords
Number of devices already sent to:
You’ll unlock your screen every time you use the car
To protect your sensitive content in the car, you must create a car profile lock. You can do this with a pin, code, or password.
Your profile lock keeps your info secure in the car, including passwords, payments, and more saved in your Google Account.
Your info is secured with a profile lock
Turning off your profile lock will remove your saved info
Developer tools are enabled. If nothing happens, please refresh the page.
Failed to load developer tools. Please check your network connection.
A Daydream-ready phone is required. Visit the Daydream Help Center for more information.
Get the Cardboard app in order to configure your viewer.
This application may not work properly without enabling Google VR Services, please enable this in phone Settings before continuing.
This application may not work properly without Google VR Services. Please install Google VR Services from the Play Store before continuing.
Customized search source convenient view switching, customizable sorting
It is detected that you are using the bottom toolbar theme that cannot prevent expanding the position. Do you want to switch the bottom theme
Do you trust this site with your data?
%1$s wants to use personal info from your digital wallet. Only continue if you trust this site. Dangerous sites might trick you into revealing things like your legal name or ID number.
%1$s wants to use personal info from your digital wallet.
%1$s has canceled the request for identity information.
This result is from your subscription, please unsubscribe / report to the corresponding subscription platform
Jump into a fun Dino game
The contacts you select will be shared with %1$s.
Check back later for new stories
Check back later for new stories
Something went wrong, please try again later
go back to the native player
using the mobile network now, if continuing consume traffic will consume
· Please try not to use your mobile phone number to register. The author cannot afford the high SMS fee
Explicitly Inform the Website Not to Track

Enabling “Do Not Track” means that a request will be included with your browsing traffic. Any effect depends on whether a website responds to the request, and how the request is interpreted.
For example, some websites may respond to this request by showing you ads that aren’t based on other websites you’ve visited. Many websites will still collect and use your browsing data — for example to improve security, to provide content, ads and recommendations, and to generate reporting statistics.
Too many folders, batch function has been disabled
(Folders cannot be added to the home screen)
Supports previewing files under 50MB, such as doc, pdf, xls...

Please enter the Dns address, before you enter, please understand the DOH function; If the wrong setting, you may not be able to access the web page; Setting an unsafe address will lead to your privacy disclosure; Please be sure to pay attention! Therefore, you need to bear the harm.
the identity of the currently selected node is fuzzy, please click expand scope
the current node identity is robust and suitable for shielding
This is a binary data stream file (blob/base64) and cannot be downloaded with third-party downloaders
Download the bookmark folder to local
If encountering issues with the download, click here for assistance.
Download error, software network is disabled. Please grant background operation and network permissions in the system settings.
affected by Android compliance, the file download directory is only allowed in the built-in directory of the app, and the directory cannot be changed temporarily. Sorry for the inconvenience

Affected by Android compliance, file download directory is only allowed in app built-in directory, temporarily unable to change directory. Sorry for the inconvenience. The current default storage path is %1$s
%1$s download prevented because file already exists.
%1$s download failed due to file system errors.
%1$s download failed due to lack of storage space.
%1$s download failed due to network failures.
%1$s download failed due to server issues.
%1$s download failed because storage location is not reachable.
%1$s download failed due to an unknown error.
Cannot download file. File format not supported.
Anyone using this device can see downloaded files
SD card not found. Some of your files may be missing.
You can save images and files to view offline or share in other apps
Articles appear here, which you can read even when you're offline
tip: about details of file download location ,click me
Download path cannot contain Chinese characters, please modify

You have set files within the size of %1$dm to download in compatibility mode, which will help you download to the file successfully to the greatest extent. The compatibility mode does not support the suspension of download. You can choose to modify the settings of the compatibility mode to enable the next download to support resumable upload.
The original download link has expired, returning to the original webpage to redownload for you
Keeps the service from being shut down
download is successful, do you want to open it?
Android external download directory (higher version Android may fail to download)
Bookmarks are synchronized to the local, and only bookmarks not included in the local are downloaded.
Learn more about why Chrome blocks some files
This file contains malware or comes from a suspicious site
Are you sure you want to download the collection from the cloud?
ensurethe TV terminal has installed the rain see screen projection app, has opened the rain see screen app, and has completed the binding
Drag and drop sort, click adjust

welcome to the small video function. Before using this function, you must know and agree to the following terms: 1. The video content is provided by Baidu short video, and all content is not modified by us. If the video content is untrue or infringes the law, please contact the corresponding platform or contact the email 625197595@qq.com 2. The content does not represent any of our views. It is just a tool for aggregating information and entertainment. As a user, you must not use it for any illegal purpose.
only web page can set independent UA!

Do you want to download ^1 again?
Do you want to start downloading ^1 again?
Please adjust your thread to 1024. Note: some download links do not support multithreading. If the download is abnormal, please adjust it to 1
you can modify your input here
Click the text below to edit
Default browser bottom sheet opened at full height
You can now use Chrome anytime you browse or tap links in messages, documents, and other apps.
Tap Apps then tap Default apps
Tap Browser app then tap Chrome
You can use Chrome any time you tap links in messages, documents and other apps
Get your history on all your devices, so you can easily pick up where you left off
You can delete some or all of your history, cookies, site data and more
Create tab groups that automatically save and update across all your devices
You’ll find your groups in the tab group section across all your devices
You have enabled this extension and it will take effect after you refresh the page
When the window is narrow, request mobile view

Please enter a number representing how many minutes the app should stay active in the background before automatically stopping. This helps save battery power. (Enter 0 to never stop and let the system handle it)

Such as: automatic redirection of pages under homepage status

There was a problem printing the page. Please try again.
Failed to load, click here to retry

This button does not indicate that your extension is malfunctioning! It is just a functional key. When your extension list is empty, or when extensions fail to install, click here to recover data. If there is no issue with your extension
The current path file creation failed, please change the download path
Your saved auto-pay method may be used for this payment. To turn off eWallets or payment app in Chrome, go to your <link1>payment settings</link1>

Your saved auto-pay method may be used for this payment. To turn off eWallets in Chrome, go to your <link1>payment settings</link1>

No longer record this site history
Sorry, this file contains EXT-X-MAP protection headers and cannot be merged for you

This site wants to open the %1s app

Use your face or screen lock to continue
Payment methods available to be selected for proceeding with the payment. Keyboard hidden.
Payment methods available to be selected for proceeding with the payment opened at full height.

As you check out, your other info will be autofilled.

Change to other payment method under this menu item.

Something went wrong. Try again later.

For new stories, pull down to refresh
Failed to open the file. Possible permission issue?
the file name already exists, please rename
File does not exist, please select again
Failed to read the file, please try to open it with another file manager

Please check the link. If it starts with file://, it means the file reading failed. Please try opening it with another file manager. If it starts with extension://, it indicates an error page launched by an extension. Please check the extension.
To read backup files and restore your bookmarks and settings, we need to request storage access. You may decline, but you will be unable to use the import feature.

Limit access to device and browser data. This setting is off.
Limit access to device and browser data. This setting is on.
Applies to embedded sites, not the site you're directly visiting
Limit access to device and browser data
Chromium will try to limit device and browser data, like installed fonts or your time zone, from embedded sites that may be trying to learn about you

display history search on home page
Using this theme, you can customize your home page with html, css, js code Please follow the steps below to configure · Set html · Set css · Set background; You are about to enter the setup process
The current webpage uses HTTP protocol and has not enabled HTTPS.
The page that you're looking for used information that you entered. Returning to that page might cause any action you took to be repeated. Do you want to continue?
https://yjllq.com/homedemo.html has been copied to the clipboard. Please open it on your computer to debug.

If you don't understand https-only, please do not open it. After opening it, you will not be able to access any websites that do not have https turned on, which means that most websites cannot be accessed normally. Please be careful
because some caches may not take effect immediately, it is necessary to restart

At present, it is detected that you are Huawei/Glory mobile phone. If you turn on this function, your mobile phone system will misreport "No Response". It is recommended that you do not turn on this function. Click OK to turn it on, and click Cancel to force it to turn it on.
f.yjllq.com has been copied to the clipboard and sent to the computer to open it.
On other devices, such as a computer, install the Hulian Browser extension

After scanning the computer plugin QR code with your browser, browser interconnection service will be enabled. If you accidentally close the mobile interconnection service, please scan the QR code again after clicking on "logout" in the plugin on your computer.

Drag from top and touch the back button to exit full screen.
Drag from top or press Esc key to exit full screen.
Drag from the side of the screen to exit full screen.
Drag from top and swipe from the left or right edge to exit full screen.

Also clear data from these sites?
Also clear data from these sites & apps?
When you type in the address bar or search box, Chrome sends what you type to your default search engine to get better suggestions. This is off in Incognito.
Available for Firefox, Chrome, Edge browsers
You are already in the source code interface, please click the back button if you need to exit.
Anyone using this device can see downloaded files
To delete Incognito browsing history from your device, close all Incognito tabs.
Sites you visit aren’t saved in Incognito

When you're in Incognito mode, sites can't use third-party cookies. If a site that relies on these cookies isn't working, you can <link>try giving that site temporary access to third-party cookies</link>.

Third-party cookies are blocked. Incognito also provides features that can limit the information available to companies whose content is embedded on a site you visit. You can manage Incognito tracking protections in <link>Settings</link>.
Use screen lock to see open Incognito tabs
Lock Incognito tabs when you leave Chrome
Incognito tabs will be locked when you leave Chrome
Chromium blocks sites from using third-party cookies in Incognito

Sites you visit may embed content and services from other sites (like images, ads, and text) which can be used to learn about you. Learn more about managing <link>Incognito tracking protections</link>
Manage information sites can use to learn about you in Incognito

When you browse in Incognito, Chromium won't save your browsing history, cookies and site data, and the information you enter in forms. Incognito also provides features that can limit the information available to embedded sites.
The file name is being completed. If you fail to obtain the file name, please complete it manually, otherwise the download will be abnormal
%1$s needs permission to access your camera to create a 3D map of your surroundings.
%1$s needs permission to access your camera for this site.
%1$s needs permission to track your hands.
%1$s needs access to your location to share your location with this site.
%1$s needs permission to access your camera and microphone for this site.
%1$s needs permission to access your microphone for this site.
system has entered the full screen mode,exit by pressing the system return key
Please enter a name for the folder
Please enter your email, and the file will be sent to your email after signing
link input error, click OK to check the instructions
Please enter your mobile phone number
please enter the correct rule link
Please enter the search prefix as follows: https://www.yousite.com/search?kw= If you need to set multiple prefixes, please use the format: Note$prefix Note$prefix

Please enter a number for minutes. For example, if you enter 5, the browser will close the keep-alive measures after 5 minutes after entering the background, which will be handed over to the system recycling mechanism for processing. We do not recommend that you set the length too large at this time.
Please enter a number for minutes. If 5, it means that the browser will upload local data to your computer every 5 minutes.
please enter the video launch link
Please enter the extension you are looking for
adapter domain name: * means all, English comma is the interval

Limit access to your IP address. This setting is off.
Limit access to your IP address. This setting is on.
Applies to embedded sites, not the site you're directly visiting
Google's privacy servers can see your IP address but not your browsing destination when protecting your IP address
Only available when Incognito is opened from a signed-in Chromium tab
Limit access to your IP address
Chromium can protect your IP address from embedded sites that may be trying to learn about you

The agent is applied to the company and other services. Enter the form of IP: port to connect to the corresponding network. Do not set it arbitrarily, which may lead to inaccessibility to the network. Leave it blank and confirm to delete it
Please enter the form of IP: Port

executing auto refresh script, click I stop

The recommended settings have been set for you
Different kernels bring incompatibility, and you can switch easily. You can also set the default.
You can click this button during web browsing. Gray represents unsafe, please browse carefully
Authoritative data sources, website security information, give it a try
Oil monkey script, Google Extensions (part). Expanding support and continuous improvement
The website is set independently to control the pages visited
The diversity of functions brings a large learning cost. You can spend some time understanding and using characteristic functions
One click completion of web page suspension windowing
Simple sniffing of media resources and deep resource analysis
Multiple screen projection schemes: DLNA screen projection under the same WiFi condition and Rainsee screen projection without network restrictions
Automatically enter the small window mode when the web page scrolls
High quality video auto pop-up (only when the video cannot replace the player)
Note: due to the difference of web pages, the playback of some web pages may fail after replacement. Please click the playback exception in the upper left corner
Because radish and cabbage have their own love, we provide multiple sets of mixed themes
Tip: you can make more customizations in the menu bar - appearance settings, such as logo modification, background change, homepage, etc
has been pasted to the clipboard. You can choose to allow without prompting, or reject

According to the notice of Hangzhou Network Information Office, the applications on the shelves of the application store should be secured to avoid decompilation and other security vulnerabilities. However, during the test, it is found that the reinforcement will cause some models to flash back, and the startup speed will be greatly reduced. The author is concerned about your use safety and your use experience. If you have the above use problems. Please click to view details for solutions to this problem
Slow start-up speed and flash back caused by reinforcement
Encrypted bookmarks cannot be edited or deleted

If you find that the webpage cannot be used normally, it may be that the expansion and customization lead to the abnormality of the website. You can click "OK" to enter the compatibility mode for you and temporarily disable all expansion and all customization settings.

1. the Android version is too low. Decompression failed 2 This plug-in is not compatible

Decompression of the expansion file failed. At present, the known reason is that the Android version is too low to decompress. This cannot be solved for the time being. I am very sorry for the inconvenience.

Keep this group to add tabs later, or delete it if you no longer need it.

due to kernel problems in the extension version, the special-shaped screen (bangs, perforations) may occasionally appear black in the status bar. Are you sure you want to start it

Plug in:%1$s is initiating a cross domain request. Do you want to allow it? This may lead to the disclosure of information entered in your web page, such as account and password. Make sure you trust this plug-in.

Sorry, storage is a necessary permission, you can continue to use it, but there are bound to be all kinds of exceptions, such as: advertising filtering failure, search segmentation failure, browser cache failure, stream saving failure. You may say why other browsers do not have such restrictions. We have our own mechanism and function scheme, and external storage is the best scheme.

Let websites know the languages you speak. They’ll show content in those languages, when possible.

Offer to send pages in other languages to Google Translate
Don’t offer to translate these languages
Don’t offer to translate these sites

Payment methods and addresses from Google Pay won’t be encrypted. Browsing history from Chrome won’t sync. Only someone with your passphrase can read your encrypted data. The passphrase is not sent to or stored by Google. If you forget your passphrase or want to change this setting, BEGIN_LINKdelete the Chrome data in your accountEND_LINK.

When intrusive software is detected manipulating the web page, it will cause the web page to slide abnormally. This may be caused by opening the barrier-free software (such as Li Hop), please add the whitelist. (Ignore if false)

View and manage saved passwords in your <link>Google Account</link>
Your organization, %1$s, manages the account you're signing in to and how Chrome can be used. Your administrator can set up or restrict certain features.

Your administrator can make changes to your profile and browser remotely, analyze information about the browser through reporting, and perform other necessary tasks. Activity on this device may also be managed outside of Chrome.
Your administrator may be able to view:

When security events are flagged by Chrome, relevant data about the events is sent to your administrator. This can include URLs of pages you visit in Chrome, URLs of pages you copied data from, file names or metadata, IP addresses, browser or tab crashes, and the username that you use to sign in to web based applications, your device and Chrome.
Your device username and Chrome username
Version information about your device and browser
A limited list of URLs of pages you visit where legacy technology events are occuring
A limited list of URLs of pages you visit where legacy technology events are occuring

URLs of pages you visit are sent to Google Cloud or third parties for analysis, and may be visible to your administrator. For example, they might be scanned to detect unsafe websites or filter websites based on rules set by the administrator.

The profile you’re signed in to is a managed profile. Your administrator can make changes to your profile settings remotely, analyze information about the browser through reporting, and perform other necessary tasks.
Browser and device OS information (such as the browser & OS versions)
Managed profile, browser, and some device information is accessible to your administrator. They can see information such as the following:
Applied browser policies in your work profile
Work profile information (such as your username)
Your administrator has turned on Chrome Enterprise Connectors on your browser. These connectors have access to some of your data.
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Maximum number of lines to display
You can have up to %1$d windows.
To open a new window, reduce the total number of windows across active and inactive to %1$d or fewer.
To restore a new window, reduce the total number of windows across active and inactive to %1$d or fewer. Inactive windows are deleted after 6 months.

Media helper - Add gestures to the original webpage player
Smart player - Replace the webpage player for a better playback experience and functionality
Tap to return to the site
The site will be able to see the contents of your screen
Webpage video enters full-screen mode, providing gesture forward and backward, long-press speed control, up and down sliding to adjust speed, defining speed, and other functions

Activate this toolbox after the webpage's original player is in full screen; supports long-pressing on the screen to enable speed control; if speed setting is abnormal, check if there are local speed plugins affecting it
